description: Detects PHP type juggling risks: loose comparison (==) that may be exploited due to PHP's type coercion, and in_array/array_search without strict mode. JSON version flags all binary_expression nodes (cannot filter to only == comparisons involving superglobals without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Binary expression detected -- verify comparison uses strict equality (===) rather than loose equality (==) to prevent type juggling vulnerabilities with user-controlled data
